topic.title: Budget-Friendly Guide to Fixing a Clogged Sink

body.p: This guide is dedicated to providing steps to solving a clogged sink with budget-friendly solutions in mind. For college students, being able to find the most accessible and cheapest solution can help in clearing cost while being able to solve the issue quickly with the least amount of time.

In this guide, information regarding sink stoppers, strategies, causes of clogs, and other information will be provided. A budget list of materials will be provided to inform of the cheapest pricing on the required items if purchase is needed.

li.xref: What Types of Stoppers Are There?
How to Remove a Pop-Up Stopper
Methods to Solving a Clogged Sink
